results.title: Noida, Greater Noida schools revise timings for Classes 1 to 8: Reason, new schedule, and the advisory
results.description: Noida and Greater Noida schools for Classes 1-8 are now operating on a reduced schedule, from 7 AM to 12 PM, due to persistent heat. This directive, effective June 29, 2026, aims to shield young students from high daytime temperatures and potential heat-related illnesses. The administration urges everyone to stay hydrated and avoid peak afternoon sun until the monsoon brings relief.

results.title: Adhere to SIR rules or face action: Telangana CEO to BLOs
results.description: The CEO said Booth Level Officers and election authorities had successfully distributed nearly 1.73 crore Enumeration Forms to voters within just four days.

results.title: How Stephen Curry-LeBron James dream pairing puts Jimmy Butler in an awkward spot? The trade rumor explained
results.description: The Warriors have emerged as a rumored destination for both Anthony Davis and LeBron James, but any blockbuster plan would likely require Jimmy Butler's contract to be moved as part of a salary-matching trade. While Butler's agent says Golden State remains committed to supporting his ACL recovery, reports suggest the franchise is exploring ways to maximize Stephen Curry's championship window. Washington's reluctance to absorb Butler's contract adds another layer of complexity, leaving Golden State facing difficult financial and roster decisions as NBA free agency begins.

results.title: Amarnath Yatra: Kulgam Police Tightens Security Grid Amid Threat Of 'Shoot-and-Scoot' Attack
results.description: Ahead of the Shri Amarnath Ji Yatra 2026, security forces, including the Kulgam Police, CRPF, and BSF, have significantly intensified vigilance after intelligence inputs of potential infiltration attempts and "shoot-and-scoot" attacks by an estimated 28 to 32 active terrorists in the Jammu region.

results.title: Srikanth ends runner-up
results.description: Fullerton (USA), June 29: India’s Kidambi Srikanth ended his impressive run with a runner-up finish at the US Open Super 300 badminton tournament after going down fighting in three games to Chinese Taipei’s Su Li-yang in the men’s singles final here. The 33-year-old Srikanth, a silver-medallist at the 2021 World Championships, recovered from the loss [...]
